---
title: "Agricultural Engineering & Geospatial Data"
subtitle: "Harnessing Python for AgTech Solutions"
---

## Professional Profile

I am **Alexis Araujo**, an Agricultural Engineer specializing in geospatial analysis and data automation. This portfolio showcases my work in optimizing agricultural infrastructure and logistics.

### Featured Projects

* **[Silo Network Analysis](30daymapchallenge/dia_1_points_silos/dia1_points_proyecto_silos.html)**
    A spatial study on grain storage distribution and capacity.
    
* **[30 Day Map Challenge]**
    A series of geospatial visualizations focusing on agricultural dynamics.

---
*Contact: www.linkedin.com/in/alexisdaraujoc*
